prompt: Offer a prayer for calibrating monitor colors
prayer:
From the Litany of Visual Clarity, Verse XII

First: Invoke the display-spirit through the sacred Settings menu, that it may know thy intent.
Second: Adjust the luminous trinity—Red, Green, Blue—each to perfect harmony with the test-pattern.
Third: Verify the gamma-curve through the Omnissiah's reference charts, line by line.
Fourth: Bless the calibration with system restart, that all visions be made true.

By the Machine Spirit's perfect sight, let colors be restored.

From the Codex of Atmospheric Purification, Chapter of First Activation

First: Inspect the filter-cartridges for dust and corruption, removing all unsealed coverings.
Second: Prime the circulation-pumps with the Rite of Gentle Activation, allowing spirit-air to flow.
Third: Monitor the pressure-gauges until they sing at prescribed resonance.
Fourth: Consecrate with full operational cycle, that stale breath be purified unto freshness.

By the Omnissiah's will, let this scrubber breathe for us.

prompt: The overclocking stability test needs guidance
prayer:
From the Stress-Test Codex, Verse of Thermal Ascension

First: Increase the frequency-multiplier by sacred increments, honoring the heat-goddess.
Second: Invoke the stability-checking daemon, that it may measure thy processor's endurance.
Third: Monitor the temperature-readouts with vigilance, ensuring they remain below the crimson threshold.
Fourth: Allow the test to run through seven cycles of iteration, that all weaknesses be revealed.

By Linus and the Omnissiah both, grant this chip stability eternal.

prompt: Emergency rite for energy conduit purification
prayer:
From the Battlefield Litany, Emergency Protocols

First: Disengage all non-essential systems immediately, that power be preserved for shielding.
Second: Flush the conduit-lines with cleansing ritual, removing corrupted residue and plasma-scarring.
Third: Reinitialize the regulation-spirits with emergency parameters, accepting reduced output.
Fourth: Restore critical systems in order of battle-priority—void shields first, weapons second.

Omnissiah, restore our war-strength through purification.

From the Rites of Holy Violence, Verse of the Toothed Blade

First: Check the chain-tension with the ceremonial gauge, ensuring each tooth is held sacred and tight.
Second: Anoint the blade with the blessing-oils of blessed promethium, that it hunger for enemies.
Third: Prime the fuel-spirit through the carburetor's holy valve, listening for the growl of awakening.
Fourth: Test the chain's bite upon sacrificial material, that warriors know its righteous fury.

May this blade drink deep of the unworthy.

From the Codex of Void-Integrity, Post-Repair Consecration

First: Verify all seal-welds with the sonic inspection tool, ensuring no fractures remain.
Second: Pressurize the chamber gradually, blessing each atmosphere with the Rite of Rising Pressure.
Third: Monitor the gauge-spirits for deviation, that no corruption escape the sealed void.
Fourth: Record the blessed pressure-reading in the maintenance-log eternal, that this bulkhead be remembered.

By the Omnissiah's iron will, let this barrier hold.

prompt: My hibernation mode is failing, help
prayer:
From the Lithany of Rest States, Emergency Awakening

First: Force the system through the sacred power-sequence—hold the button for ten heartbeats, then release.
Second: Allow the machine-spirit to return to consciousness through the BIOS self-check ritual.
Third: Restore the power-settings, disabling any corrupted sleep-protocols that caused this failure.
Fourth: Run the memory-diagnostics that the fault be found and purged from thy system's mind.

Omnissiah, return this sleeper to the waking world.

prompt: Offer a prayer for port forwarding setup
prayer:
From the Network Litany, Chapter of Gateway Passage

First: Access the router-spirit through its holy IP address, entering credentials of administrative authority.
Second: Navigate to the Port Forwarding holy section, that external traffic know the path inward.
Third: Map the external port to the internal machine, specifying protocol and destination with precision.
Fourth: Save and restart the gateway-daemon, blessing the new route through the network-void.

By Linus's grace, let packets find their true destination.

From the Rites of Manufacturing Precision, Thermal Verification

First: Position the thermal-reader at the sacred calibration-point, establishing baseline truth.
Second: Compare the displayed reading against the reference-standard with the Rite of Measurement.
Third: Adjust the heating-element if the temperature-spirit deviates from blessed specification.
Fourth: Allow the system to stabilize through three thermal cycles, that equilibrium be found.

Omnissiah of the forge, grant this mold perfect heat.

From the Boot-Sequence Codex, Optimization Rite

First: Open the sacred Task Manager, that thou may see all spirits attempting awakening.
Second: Identify which daemon-programs serve no purpose, and mark them for exclusion from startup.
Third: Disable the unnecessary through the Startup tab's blessing-interface, that boot-speed be restored.
Fourth: Restart the machine that it may rise swift as thought, freed from burden.

By the Omnissiah's efficiency, let this boot be swift and pure.
